title: Add integration tests for the full storage → sync → search path
implementation_notes: Create integration.test.ts — tests that wire storage + sync + retriever together without mocking storage.
Use in-memory SQLite (:memory:) for every test; no filesystem side effects.
Cover: sync from fixture read-model → search hits → canonical resolution round-trip.
Cover: sync idempotency (sync twice, assert storage unchanged).
Cover: search returns empty hits for queries that match nothing.
Cover: no secret fields present in any returned hit or resolved entity payload.
acceptance_criteria: integration.test.ts passes with bun test; no real vault files are read or written.
Tests fail if sync stops pushing documents into storage.
Tests fail if search returns results that contain raw vault body or executionNotes.
Tests fail if retrieval resolution returns stale or wrong canonical entities.
Overall test count increases (i.e., tests are real, not skipped).
completion_summary: Added integration coverage for storage, sync, and search resolution, plus focused tests for query/path hardening and stale-document cleanup.
